title: Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple
tagline: Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sri Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Hanuman located in Peelamedu, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Sri Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Hanuman located in Peelamedu, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. The idol of the deity is made of Salagrama stone. In the temple, Goddess Lakshmi graces the devotees from the right palm of Hanuman who tail faces North, direction of Kubera, God of wealth. The main deity faces west, is seen posing Abhaya Mudra with his right hand and holding a mace with the other hand.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Loga Nayaga Shaniswara Temple
topPlaces.description: Loga Nayaga Shaniswara temple is located at Puliakulam, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. The temple is located adjacent to Puliakulam Mariamman temple and the main deity is Shani.

topPlaces.name: Meena Estate
topPlaces.description: Meena Estate is a residential area which was promoted by the Coimbatore Corporation in the State of Tamil Nadu, India. Meena Estate has become a costlier area that came into a position of 8th in the city.

topPlaces.name: Fun Republic Mall (Coimbatore)
topPlaces.description: Fun Republic Mall is a shopping mall in Peelamedu, Coimbatore, India. This shopping mall was inaugurated on 19 August 2012 and Managed by E-city Ventures which is part of the Essel Group.

topPlaces.name: Arulmigu Munthi Vinayagar Temple
topPlaces.description: Arulmigu Munthi Vinayagar Temple, is a Hindu temple located in the neighbourhood of Puliakulam in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to the god Munthi Vinayagar, a form of Ganesha.

topPlaces.name: Gedee Car Museum
topPlaces.description: Gedee Car Museum or GD Museum, is a private vintage car museum located in the city of Coimbatore, India.

topPlaces.name: Ayyappan Temple, Coimbatore
topPlaces.description: Ayyappan Temple is a Hindu Ayyappan Temple located in Siddhapudur in Coimbatore, India. It is dedicated to Ayyappan.

topPlaces.name: Peelamedu
topPlaces.description: Peelamedu is a major commercial centre and residential locality in the Eastern part of the city of Coimbatore in Tamil Nadu, India. It is governed by Coimbatore City Municipal Corporation since 1981.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (5 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ashtamsa Varadha Anjaneyar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Loga Nayaga Shaniswara Temple, Meena Estate, Fun Republic Mall (Coimbatore), Arulmigu Munthi Vinayagar Temple, Gedee Car Museum.
